talk_metadata.talk_title: Granulocyte Reprogramming in Gastric Metaplasia and the Tumor Microenvironment
rhetorical_signals: Speaker said: "we don't know who's going to progress on to gastric cancer"
Speaker said: "we are seeing a decrease at least by two weeks"
Speaker said: "these drugs have been on the market since 2002, so essentially they're off patent"

key_data_gaps: No spatial profiling of SLUFN12L+ cells in tissue

crispro_opportunity.description: Lack of a validated biomarker to prospectively identify patients with high SLUFN12L+ granulocytic MDSC burden who would benefit most from PDE inhibition.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker noted that SLUFN12L+ cells are absent in normal tissue but increase from metaplasia to tumor and decrease after tadalafil treatment.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO could develop a predictive gene‑expression signature for SLUFN12L‑positive MDSCs to enrich future trials.

crispro_opportunity.description: Targeting PDE6‑dependent cyclic GMP breakdown to induce apoptosis of granulocytic MDSCs and restore T‑cell function.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker explained that inhibition of cyclic GMP phosphodiesterases (e.g., sildenafil, tadalafil) leads to accumulation of cGMP, activation of PKG, and MDSC apoptosis.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can model the cGMP‑PKG pathway and predict synergistic combinations with checkpoint inhibitors.

crispro_opportunity.description: Combine PDE inhibition with standard neoadjuvant FLOT chemotherapy or checkpoint blockade to achieve deeper MDSC depletion and T‑cell activation.
crispro_opportunity.transcript_evidence: Speaker reported that after two weeks of tadalafil followed by FLOT, granulocytic MDSCs were virtually eliminated and CD8+ T cells increased.
crispro_opportunity.crispro_angle: CrisPRO can simulate multi‑agent schedules to optimize timing and dosing of PDE inhibitors with chemotherapy or immunotherapy.

cited_competitors.name: FLOT chemotherapy regimen
cited_competitors.context: Standard neoadjuvant treatment used after the tadalafil window

cited_competitors.name: Sildenafil / Tadalafil (PDE inhibitors)
cited_competitors.context: Repurposed off‑patent drugs evaluated as a neoadjuvant window therapy

unresolved_questions: What is the optimal timing and duration of PDE inhibition for maximal MDSC depletion?
Do SLUFN12L‑positive MDSCs appear earlier in the metaplastic cascade, and could prophylactic PDE inhibition prevent cancer development?
What is the spatial distribution of SLUFN12L‑positive cells within the gastric mucosa and tumor microenvironment?

companies_to_monitor: Biotech firms developing selective PDE6 inhibitors
